name: Barkskin
description: Grants a +2 bonus to natural armor (improves to +3/+4/+5 at higher caster levels).

name: Bear's Endurance
description: Grants a +4 enhancement bonus to Constitution.

name: Bless
description: Grants a +1 morale bonus on attack rolls (and on saves against fear).

name: Bull's Strength
description: Grants a +4 enhancement bonus to Strength.

name: Cat's Grace
description: Grants a +4 enhancement bonus to Dexterity.

name: Eagle's Splendor
description: Grants a +4 enhancement bonus to Charisma.

name: Enlarge Person
description: Grows the target one size category larger; set Size to Large yourself for reach and CMB/CMD, since the size table already covers those.

name: Fox's Cunning
description: Grants a +4 enhancement bonus to Intelligence.

name: Haste
description: Grants one extra attack at the highest bonus when making a full attack, in addition to the listed bonuses.

name: Heroism
description: Grants a +2 morale bonus on attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks.

name: Inspire Courage
description: Also grants a +1 morale bonus on saves against charm and fear effects; the competence bonuses scale up with bard level.

name: Mage Armor
description: Grants a +4 armor bonus to AC.

name: Owl's Wisdom
description: Grants a +4 enhancement bonus to Wisdom.

name: Power Attack (-1/+2)
description: Trades melee attack rolls for damage; the penalty/bonus ratio scales up as base attack bonus increases.

name: Rage
description: Grants a +4 morale bonus to Strength and Constitution and a +2 morale bonus on Will saves, but -2 to AC.

name: Shield (spell)
description: Grants a +4 shield bonus to AC and blocks magic missiles entirely.
